description.value: Aura moderate evocation; CL 6th Slot none; Weight -; Price 178 gp DESCRIPTION When propelled from a firearm, this +1 alchemical paper cartridge changes the damage to cold damage. If the target takes cold damage from the cartridge, it must succeed at a DC 14 Fortitude saving throw or be staggered for 1d4 rounds. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Craft Magic Arms and Armor, cone of cold; Cost 98 gp
